english translation text: AB BHI AATI HAI SAKINA KI SADAIN LOGONHAYE ZINDAANO SAIThe voice of Sakina can still be heard from the prison of ShaamEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
MERAI BABA SAI MILA DO MAIN DUAIN DUN GI,SISKIAN LAI KAI JO KEHTI THI MUSALMANO SAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text: She used to cry and ask the muslims, “please take me to my father, I will pray for you”

urdu transliteration text:
BOLAI SAJJAD SAKINA YEH MUQADDAR TERABAI QAFAN TUJ KO LIYAI PHIRTA HUN BAZARON MAINAUR LAHU AJ BHI JAARI TERAI KAANO SAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Imam Sajjad said: “this is your destiny O Sakina, I am carrying your body and unable to find a shroud for you,
and the blood is still flowing from your ears”

urdu transliteration text:
JA KAI MAQTAL MAIN PUKARI YEH SAKINA RO KERBAHIYA QASIM MERAI AKBER TUM KAHAN HO SARAIMERAI BABA KO BACHA LO AAKAI SHAITANON SAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Sakina went towards the battlefield and said crying, “O Brother Qasim and Ali Akbar, where have you all gone?
Please save my Baba from these evil ones!”

O Zainab, when you left Madina everyone was with you,
now that you have returned to your house alone

urdu transliteration text:
LABAI DERYA SAI ALAMDAR KI AAYI YEH SADAAI SAKINA TUJ SAI SHARMINDA HAI CHA CHA TERAPAANI PHONCHA NA SAKA HAI KATAI SHANO SAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The voice of Hazrat Abbas was heard from the river bank,
“O Sakina, your Uncle cannot face you,
I was unable to bring water to you with these severed arms”

urdu transliteration text:
AJ ADHAN PAY AIK WAQT FAZA MAIN GOONJISANI-E-ZEHRA KAI KHUTBON KO DABANAY KAI LIYAISHOR BERPA KIYA DERBA MAIN ADHANO SAI
@HujjatELC
english translation text: In the court of Yazid it was ordered that the Adhan was called out to drown out the sermons of Zainab (s),
